name: grep
description: Search file contents with regex. Powered by ripgrep when available. Use `output_mode` to choose content / files-with-matches / count. `glob` filter limits to matching files.

path.description: File or directory to search. Relative paths resolve against the session workdir. Omit to search the workdir.

glob.description: Only search files matching this glob (e.g. `*.py`, `**/test_*.py`).

-n.description: Show line numbers in content mode. Default true.

context.description: Lines of context before and after each match (content mode only).
